name: Missy
desc: Our oldest resident at around 21, Missy is a gentle Siamese who loves human affection. She walks with a slight limp and is partially blind, but her sweet, calm nature makes her a firm favourite with every visitor.

name: Jimmy
desc: A domestic long-fur rescued from breeders, Jimmy is around 16 years old. Once wary of handling, he has blossomed in his later years. Catch him most active in the mornings, often spotted on the cat bridge.

name: Tommy
desc: A full black Singapore cat and an original since 2014, Tommy is around 13 years old. Currently on palliative care for nasal cancer, he still enjoys a gentle pet and the company of his humans.

name: Oreo
desc: Named after his black-and-white coat, Oreo is around 12 years old. Gentle and great with children, he will happily do a high-five for a treat.

name: Marshmellow
desc: A fluffy all-white Singapore short-fur of around 7, Marshmellow joined us after the Rail Mall cafe closed. Affectionate and laid-back, he is most often found sleeping beside his best friend Marmite.

name: Marmite
desc: An off-white calico of around 8, Marmite is loud and unashamedly affectionate. She will meow for your attention and loves a gentle butt pat.

name: Bobo
desc: A gentle Siamese of around 7-8 years, Bobo meows softly and loves human company. Before mealtimes he can be found sparring playfully with Mochi and Marshmellow.

name: Mochi
desc: Our biggest cat at 6-7 kg, Mochi is around 9 years old and is our cafe mascot - he looks just like our logo! Most active in the mornings and very hard to miss.

name: Sushi
desc: A slightly plump black-and-white cat, Sushi once lived beside a kopitiam. These days she has traded street life for laps and loves nothing more than resting on a customer.

name: Miso
desc: Sister to Shoyu and around 4 years old, Miso is named for the warm tinge in her undercoat. She loves teaser toys and is often found in a game of catch with Toby, Shoyu and Momo.

name: Shoyu
desc: Miso's sister at around 3 years old, Shoyu was rescued from a Tuas factory. Once timid and fearful, she now tolerates light pets and chases the other cats with confidence.

name: Momo
desc: An orange female of around 4, Momo is playful and affectionate. She loves light head pets and can often be found in a game of catch with Toby.

name: Toby
desc: The first face you will likely see - Toby greets visitors at the entrance. Around 3 years old with an unusually dense grey coat, he is gentle with children and endlessly playful.
